prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a Chinese tile game’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一種中國傳統遊戲，通常由四人使用一組有花色標記的麻將牌進行」？

example.text: We played mahjong with our neighbors after dinner.

translation.zh-Hant: 晚餐後，我們和鄰居一起打麻將。

meaning.en: A Chinese game for four players played with sets of marked tiles.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種中國傳統遊戲，通常由四人使用一組有花色標記的麻將牌進行。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘fairly good’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「還算不錯；比普通好一些」？

example.text: The hotel room was not bad for the price.

translation.zh-Hant: 以這個價位來說，這間飯店房間還不錯。

meaning.en: Reasonably or fairly good.
meaning.zh-Hant: 還算不錯；比普通好一些。

plainExpression: an employee who does desk-based work

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an employee who does desk-based work’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在辦公室從事行政或專業工作的人」？

example.text: As an office worker, Mia spends much of her day at a computer.

translation.zh-Hant: 身為辦公室職員，Mia 每天有大半時間都在使用電腦。

meaning.en: A person employed to do administrative or professional work in an office.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在辦公室從事行政或專業工作的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an exclamation of alarm’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來表達驚慌、懊惱或擔心的感嘆語」？

example.text: Oh no, I left my passport at the hotel.

translation.zh-Hant: 糟了，我把護照留在飯店了。

meaning.en: An exclamation used to express alarm, dismay, or concern.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來表達驚慌、懊惱或擔心的感嘆語。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘very recently’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「剛剛；就在不久前」？

example.text: The train has only just left the station.

translation.zh-Hant: 火車才剛離站。

meaning.en: Very recently; a short time ago.
meaning.zh-Hant: 剛剛；就在不久前。

plainExpression: a person who expects good outcomes

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a person who expects good outcomes’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「傾向期待事情會有好結果的人」？

example.text: An optimist sees a setback as a chance to improve.

translation.zh-Hant: 樂觀的人會把挫折視為改進的機會。

meaning.en: A person who tends to expect good or favorable outcomes.
meaning.zh-Hant: 傾向期待事情會有好結果的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘except for’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「除了……之外」？

example.text: Other than one delayed flight, the trip went smoothly.

translation.zh-Hant: 除了有一班班機延誤之外，這趟旅程都很順利。

meaning.en: Except for; apart from.
meaning.zh-Hant: 除了……之外。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘clothes worn for sleeping’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「睡覺時穿的寬鬆衣物」？

example.text: The children changed into their pajamas before bed.

translation.zh-Hant: 孩子們睡前換上了睡衣。

meaning.en: Loose clothing worn in bed for sleeping.
meaning.zh-Hant: 睡覺時穿的寬鬆衣物。

plainExpression: a dish made from shaped dough

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a dish made from shaped dough’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將麵糰製成麵條、管狀等形狀後煮熟的料理」？

example.text: We ordered fresh pasta with tomato sauce.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們點了佐番茄醬的新鮮義大利麵。

meaning.en: A dish made from dough shaped into forms such as noodles or tubes and cooked in water.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將麵糰製成麵條、管狀等形狀後煮熟的料理。

plainExpression: a member of the police force

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a member of the police force’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「負責執法並保護民眾的警察人員」？

example.text: A police officer helped us find the missing bag.

translation.zh-Hant: 一名警察協助我們找回遺失的包包。

meaning.en: A member of a police force responsible for enforcing the law and protecting the public.
meaning.zh-Hant: 負責執法並保護民眾的警察人員。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a local police headquarters’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「地方警察單位作為辦公與執勤據點的建築物」？

example.text: Please take the lost wallet to the nearest police station.

translation.zh-Hant: 請把撿到的皮夾送到最近的警察局。

meaning.en: A building used by a local police force as its headquarters.
meaning.zh-Hant: 地方警察單位作為辦公與執勤據點的建築物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘almost completely’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「幾乎完全；差不多」？

example.text: The new schedule has pretty well solved our staffing problem.

translation.zh-Hant: 新班表幾乎解決了我們的人力問題。

meaning.en: Almost completely; very nearly.
meaning.zh-Hant: 幾乎完全；差不多。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a school for young children’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「提供兒童最初幾年正式教育的學校」？

example.text: Her son starts primary school in September.

translation.zh-Hant: 她兒子九月開始上小學。

meaning.en: A school for children in the first years of formal education.
meaning.zh-Hant: 提供兒童最初幾年正式教育的學校。

plainExpression: a device that produces paper copies

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a device that produces paper copies’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「通常連接電腦、可將文字或影像列印在紙上的裝置」？

example.text: The office printer is out of paper.

translation.zh-Hant: 辦公室的印表機沒紙了。

meaning.en: A device, usually connected to a computer, that prints text or images onto paper.
meaning.zh-Hant: 通常連接電腦、可將文字或影像列印在紙上的裝置。

plainExpression: a formal language used to instruct computers

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a formal language used to instruct computers’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來向電腦下達指令的一套正式文字與符號系統」？

example.text: Python is the first programming language she learned.

translation.zh-Hant: Python 是她學會的第一種程式語言。

meaning.en: A formal system of words and symbols used to give instructions to a computer.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來向電腦下達指令的一套正式文字與符號系統。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘advancement to a higher position’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在工作中晉升到更高的職級或職位」？

example.text: He earned a promotion after leading the project successfully.

translation.zh-Hant: 他成功帶領專案後獲得升遷。

meaning.en: Advancement to a higher rank or position at work.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在工作中晉升到更高的職級或職位。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘restart a computer or system’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「讓電腦或電子系統重新執行啟動程序」？

example.text: Please reboot the router if the connection stops working.

translation.zh-Hant: 如果連線中斷，請重新啟動路由器。

meaning.en: To restart a computer or electronic system by running its startup process again.
meaning.zh-Hant: 讓電腦或電子系統重新執行啟動程序。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘concerning’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「關於；有關」？

example.text: I am writing regarding your hotel reservation.

translation.zh-Hant: 我寫信是關於您的飯店訂房。

meaning.en: Concerning; about.
meaning.zh-Hant: 關於；有關。

plainExpression: a mobile phone with advanced computing features

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a mobile phone with advanced computing features’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「具備進階運算功能與網路連線能力的行動電話」？

example.text: She used her smartphone to show the electronic ticket.

translation.zh-Hant: 她用智慧型手機出示電子票券。

meaning.en: A mobile phone with advanced computing features and internet access.
meaning.zh-Hant: 具備進階運算功能與網路連線能力的行動電話。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘without problems or difficulties’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「順利地；沒有問題或阻礙地」？

example.text: The meeting ran smoothly because everyone came prepared.

translation.zh-Hant: 因為大家都有準備，會議進行得很順利。

meaning.en: With no problems or difficulties.
meaning.zh-Hant: 順利地；沒有問題或阻礙地。

plainExpression: a covering worn on the foot

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a covering worn on the foot’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「穿在腳部與小腿下方的針織或編織衣物」？

example.text: I found a missing sock under the bed.

translation.zh-Hant: 我在床底下找到一隻不見的襪子。

meaning.en: A knitted or woven covering worn on the foot and lower leg.
meaning.zh-Hant: 穿在腳部與小腿下方的針織或編織衣物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in another place’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在其他地方；到別處」？

example.text: This table is reserved, so we need to sit somewhere else.

translation.zh-Hant: 這張桌子有人預訂了，所以我們得坐到別的地方。

meaning.en: In or at another place.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在其他地方；到別處。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a salty fermented soybean seasoning’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「主要以發酵黃豆製成的鹹味液態調味料」？

example.text: Add a little soy sauce to the noodles.

translation.zh-Hant: 在麵裡加一點醬油。

meaning.en: A salty liquid seasoning made mainly from fermented soybeans.
meaning.zh-Hant: 主要以發酵黃豆製成的鹹味液態調味料。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the highest legal driving speed’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「法律允許車輛行駛的最高速度」？

example.text: The speed limit on this road is fifty kilometers per hour.

translation.zh-Hant: 這條路的速限是每小時五十公里。

meaning.en: The maximum speed that vehicles are legally allowed to travel.
meaning.zh-Hant: 法律允許車輛行駛的最高速度。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘continued existence despite danger’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「人或事物持續存活或存在，尤其是在面臨危險時」？

example.text: Clean drinking water is essential for survival.

translation.zh-Hant: 乾淨的飲用水是生存的必要條件。

meaning.en: The continued existence or life of a person or thing, especially despite danger.
meaning.zh-Hant: 人或事物持續存活或存在，尤其是在面臨危險時。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘inclined to speak a lot’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「健談的；喜歡說很多話的」？

example.text: Our new colleague is friendly and talkative.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們的新同事既友善又健談。

meaning.en: Inclined to talk a lot.
meaning.zh-Hant: 健談的；喜歡說很多話的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘digital industry’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「科技，尤其指現代數位或電子科技」？

example.text: She works in tech and develops mobile applications.

translation.zh-Hant: 她在科技業工作，負責開發行動應用程式。

meaning.en: Technology, especially modern digital or electronic technology.
meaning.zh-Hant: 科技，尤其指現代數位或電子科技。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an expression of agreement’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來確認某事正確或表示同意的說法」？

example.text: "That's right," the clerk said, "your train leaves at nine."

translation.zh-Hant: 「沒錯，」櫃檯人員說，「您的火車九點出發。」

meaning.en: An expression used to confirm that something is correct or to agree with someone.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來確認某事正確或表示同意的說法。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘extremely excited and pleased’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「感到非常興奮或欣喜的」？

example.text: We were thrilled to hear that our proposal was accepted.

translation.zh-Hant: 得知提案獲得接受，我們非常興奮。

meaning.en: Extremely excited or delighted.
meaning.zh-Hant: 感到非常興奮或欣喜的。

plainExpression: a brush used to clean teeth

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a brush used to clean teeth’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「搭配牙膏清潔牙齒的小刷子」？

example.text: I packed a toothbrush but forgot the toothpaste.

translation.zh-Hant: 我帶了牙刷，卻忘了帶牙膏。

meaning.en: A small brush used with toothpaste to clean the teeth.
meaning.zh-Hant: 搭配牙膏清潔牙齒的小刷子。

plainExpression: the process of learning practical skills

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the process of learning practical skills’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「教授或學習實用技能的活動」？

example.text: All new employees receive safety training on their first day.

translation.zh-Hant: 所有新進員工第一天都會接受安全訓練。

meaning.en: The activity of teaching or acquiring practical skills.
meaning.zh-Hant: 教授或學習實用技能的活動。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a long time ago’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「很久以前」？

example.text: We first met way back in primary school.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們早在小學時就認識了。

meaning.en: Long ago.
meaning.zh-Hant: 很久以前。

plainExpression: communication designed to promote products or services

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘communication designed to promote products or services’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為了向潛在顧客推廣產品或服務而進行的公開傳播」？

example.text: The company increased its advertising before the product launch.

translation.zh-Hant: 公司在產品上市前增加了廣告宣傳。

meaning.en: Public communication intended to promote products or services to potential customers.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為了向潛在顧客推廣產品或服務而進行的公開傳播。

plainExpression: a clock that sounds at a set time

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a clock that sounds at a set time’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「會在預設時間發出聲響，通常用來叫人起床的時鐘」？

example.text: I set my alarm clock for six thirty.

translation.zh-Hant: 我把鬧鐘設在六點半。

meaning.en: A clock designed to sound an alert at a preset time, usually to wake someone.
meaning.zh-Hant: 會在預設時間發出聲響，通常用來叫人起床的時鐘。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in an angry manner’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「生氣地；帶著怒氣地」？

example.text: The customer spoke angrily after waiting for an hour.

translation.zh-Hant: 等了一個小時後，那位顧客生氣地說話。

meaning.en: In an angry manner.
meaning.zh-Hant: 生氣地；帶著怒氣地。

plainExpression: an entrance at the rear of a building

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘an entrance at the rear of a building’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「位於建築物或房屋後方的出入口」？

example.text: Please leave the package beside the back door.

translation.zh-Hant: 請把包裹放在後門旁。

meaning.en: An entrance at the rear of a building or house.
meaning.zh-Hant: 位於建築物或房屋後方的出入口。

plainExpression: a scientist who studies living organisms

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a scientist who studies living organisms’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「研究生物與生命現象的科學家」？

example.text: The biologist collected water samples from the lake.

translation.zh-Hant: 那位生物學家從湖中採集水樣。

meaning.en: A scientist who studies living organisms.
meaning.zh-Hant: 研究生物與生命現象的科學家。

plainExpression: a decorated cake for a birthday

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a decorated cake for a birthday’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為慶祝某人生日而製作，通常會加以裝飾的蛋糕」？

example.text: We put twelve candles on the birthday cake.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們在生日蛋糕上插了十二根蠟燭。

meaning.en: A cake, often decorated, made to celebrate someone's birthday.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為慶祝某人生日而製作，通常會加以裝飾的蛋糕。

plainExpression: a classification of a person's blood

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a classification of a person's blood’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「依特定抗原是否存在而劃分的血液類型」？

example.text: The nurse asked me to confirm my blood type.

translation.zh-Hant: 護理師請我確認自己的血型。

meaning.en: A classification of blood based on the presence or absence of particular antigens.
meaning.zh-Hant: 依特定抗原是否存在而劃分的血液類型。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘annoyed or worried’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因某事而感到惱火、擔心或困擾的」？

example.text: She was bothered by the constant noise outside.

translation.zh-Hant: 她被外面持續不斷的噪音弄得很困擾。

meaning.en: Annoyed, worried, or troubled by something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因某事而感到惱火、擔心或困擾的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘on the other hand’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來帶出相反的考量或另一種可能性」？

example.text: The train is cheaper, but then the flight is much faster.

translation.zh-Hant: 搭火車比較便宜，不過話說回來，搭飛機快得多。

meaning.en: Used to introduce a contrasting consideration or possibility.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來帶出相反的考量或另一種可能性。

plainExpression: the grounds of a school or institution

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the grounds of a school or institution’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「學校、大學或其他機構的用地與建築群」？

example.text: The library is on the east side of the campus.

translation.zh-Hant: 圖書館位於校園東側。

meaning.en: The grounds and buildings of a school, university, or other institution.
meaning.zh-Hant: 學校、大學或其他機構的用地與建築群。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘preserved in a sealed can’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「密封保存在罐頭中的」？

example.text: We keep canned beans in the cupboard for quick meals.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們在櫥櫃裡放了罐裝豆子，方便快速備餐。

meaning.en: Preserved in a sealed can.
meaning.zh-Hant: 密封保存在罐頭中的。

plainExpression: the head cook in a restaurant

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the head cook in a restaurant’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「餐廳或其他機構中負責掌理廚房的主廚」？

example.text: The chef prepared a vegetarian meal for us.

translation.zh-Hant: 主廚為我們準備了一份素食餐點。

meaning.en: The head cook of a restaurant or other establishment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 餐廳或其他機構中負責掌理廚房的主廚。

plainExpression: a medical facility for outpatient care

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a medical facility for outpatient care’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「醫療機構，尤其指診斷與治療門診病人的場所」？

example.text: The clinic accepts patients without appointments in the morning.

translation.zh-Hant: 這間診所上午接受未預約的病人看診。

meaning.en: A medical facility, especially one that diagnoses and treats outpatients.
meaning.zh-Hant: 醫療機構，尤其指診斷與治療門診病人的場所。

plainExpression: the activity of riding a bicycle

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘the activity of riding a bicycle’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為交通、運動、競賽或休閒而騎自行車的活動」？

example.text: Cycling to work helps him stay active.

translation.zh-Hant: 騎自行車上班有助於他保持活動量。

meaning.en: The activity of riding bicycles for transport, exercise, sport, or recreation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為交通、運動、競賽或休閒而騎自行車的活動。

plainExpression: a large shop divided into product sections

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a large shop divided into product sections’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「分成多個部門、販售不同類別商品的大型商店」？

example.text: The department store has a food court on the top floor.

translation.zh-Hant: 這間百貨公司頂樓設有美食街。

meaning.en: A large store divided into departments that sell different kinds of goods.
meaning.zh-Hant: 分成多個部門、販售不同類別商品的大型商店。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘having or relating to diabetes’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「患有糖尿病的，或與糖尿病相關的」？

example.text: She is diabetic and checks her blood sugar every day.

translation.zh-Hant: 她患有糖尿病，每天都會測量血糖。

meaning.en: Having diabetes or relating to diabetes.
meaning.zh-Hant: 患有糖尿病的，或與糖尿病相關的。

plainExpression: a round handle used to open a door

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a round handle used to open a door’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「轉動後可開關門的圓形門把」？

plainExpression: a passenger vehicle that runs on street tracks

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a passenger vehicle that runs on street tracks’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在道路鋪設的軌道上行駛的大眾運輸車輛」？

example.text: We took the tram from the station to the museum.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們從車站搭路面電車到博物館。

meaning.en: A public passenger vehicle that runs on tracks laid in a road.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在道路鋪設的軌道上行駛的大眾運輸車輛。

plainExpression: a person who converts text between languages

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘a person who converts text between languages’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將書面文字從一種語言轉換成另一種語言的人」？

example.text: The translator checked the legal document carefully.

translation.zh-Hant: 翻譯人員仔細核對了法律文件。

meaning.en: A person who converts written text from one language into another.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將書面文字從一種語言轉換成另一種語言的人。

plainExpression: too painful or unpleasant to tolerate

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘too painful or unpleasant to tolerate’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「痛苦或不舒服到令人無法忍受的」？

example.text: The heat inside the crowded bus became unbearable.

translation.zh-Hant: 擁擠公車裡的悶熱變得令人難以忍受。

meaning.en: So painful or unpleasant that it cannot be tolerated.
meaning.zh-Hant: 痛苦或不舒服到令人無法忍受的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘currently being built’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「目前正在建造或開發中的」？

example.text: The bridge is under construction, so traffic is being redirected.

translation.zh-Hant: 這座橋正在施工，因此車流改道。

meaning.en: Currently being built or developed.
meaning.zh-Hant: 目前正在建造或開發中的。

plainExpression: located at a higher position or level

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘located at a higher position or level’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「位於較高的位置、層級、等級或順序的」？

example.text: Store the lighter boxes on the upper shelf.

translation.zh-Hant: 把較輕的箱子放在上層架子上。

meaning.en: Located at a higher physical position, level, rank, or order.
meaning.zh-Hant: 位於較高的位置、層級、等級或順序的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘positive side’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「某個情況中有利的一面，即使它也有缺點」？

example.text: The upside of taking the early flight is that we will arrive before noon.

translation.zh-Hant: 搭早班機的好處是我們能在中午前抵達。

meaning.en: A beneficial aspect of a situation that also has disadvantages.
meaning.zh-Hant: 某個情況中有利的一面，即使它也有缺點。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘front vehicle glass’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「車輛前方的玻璃屏障，用來保護車內乘客免受風雨影響」？

example.text: I cleared the ice from the windshield before driving.

translation.zh-Hant: 開車前，我先清除了擋風玻璃上的冰。

meaning.en: The glass screen at the front of a vehicle that protects its occupants from wind and weather.
meaning.zh-Hant: 車輛前方的玻璃屏障，用來保護車內乘客免受風雨影響。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person who cleans’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以清潔建築物、房間或其他場所為工作的人」？

example.text: The cleaner comes to the office every evening after everyone leaves.

translation.zh-Hant: 每天傍晚大家離開後，清潔人員會來辦公室打掃。

meaning.en: A person whose job is to clean buildings, rooms, or other places.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以清潔建築物、房間或其他場所為工作的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘room for eating meals’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「住家或飯店中供人用餐的房間」？

example.text: We eat breakfast together in the dining room every Sunday.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們每個星期日都會一起在飯廳吃早餐。

meaning.en: A room in a home or hotel where people eat meals.
meaning.zh-Hant: 住家或飯店中供人用餐的房間。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘not as good as expected’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「未達到預期，因而令人失望的」？

example.text: The hotel room was disappointing because it was noisy and dirty.

translation.zh-Hant: 那間飯店房間又吵又髒，令人失望。

meaning.en: Failing to be as good as expected and therefore causing disappointment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 未達到預期，因而令人失望的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘paper organizer’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來把相關文件收在一起的封套或資料夾」？

example.text: Please put the signed contract in the blue folder.

translation.zh-Hant: 請把簽好的合約放進藍色資料夾。

meaning.en: A cover or organizer used to keep related papers together.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來把相關文件收在一起的封套或資料夾。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘burger in a bun’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將煎熟的肉餅夾在切開的圓麵包中製成的熱三明治」？

example.text: He ordered a hamburger with lettuce, tomato, and cheese.

translation.zh-Hant: 他點了一個加生菜、番茄和起司的漢堡。

meaning.en: A hot sandwich made with a cooked patty served inside a sliced bun.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將煎熟的肉餅夾在切開的圓麵包中製成的熱三明治。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘lack of effort’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不願工作或付出努力的特質」？

example.text: His laziness caused him to miss the project deadline.

translation.zh-Hant: 他的懶惰使他錯過了專案截止日期。

meaning.en: The quality of being unwilling to work or make an effort.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不願工作或付出努力的特質。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘edge of the mouth’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「嘴巴開口周圍上下兩片柔軟的肉質部分之一」？

example.text: She cut her lower lip when she fell off her bicycle.

translation.zh-Hant: 她從腳踏車上摔下來時割傷了下唇。

meaning.en: Either of the two soft, fleshy edges around the opening of the mouth.
meaning.zh-Hant: 嘴巴開口周圍上下兩片柔軟的肉質部分之一。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘taking pictures’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「創作照片的藝術、實務與技術」？

example.text: Photography allows her to record ordinary moments in a creative way.

translation.zh-Hant: 攝影讓她能以有創意的方式記錄日常時刻。

meaning.en: The art, practice, and technology of creating photographs.
meaning.zh-Hant: 創作照片的藝術、實務與技術。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘statement about the future’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「對某人認為未來會發生之事所做的陳述」？

example.text: Her prediction about next year's sales proved accurate.

translation.zh-Hant: 她對明年銷售額的預測後來證明很準確。

meaning.en: A statement about what someone believes will happen in the future.
meaning.zh-Hant: 對某人認為未來會發生之事所做的陳述。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘half of an academic year’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一學年劃分成的兩個主要學期之一」？

example.text: Her final exams begin at the end of the semester.

translation.zh-Hant: 她的期末考會在學期結束時開始。

meaning.en: One of the two main periods into which an academic year is divided.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一學年劃分成的兩個主要學期之一。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘natural light from the sun’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「來自太陽的自然光」？

example.text: Open the curtains and let some sunlight into the room.

translation.zh-Hant: 把窗簾打開，讓一些陽光照進房間。

meaning.en: The natural light that comes from the sun.
meaning.zh-Hant: 來自太陽的自然光。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘road signal’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「以燈號告訴駕駛人與行人何時停止或通行的道路號誌」？

example.text: Wait for the traffic light to turn green before crossing the street.

translation.zh-Hant: 過馬路前，請等紅綠燈變成綠燈。

meaning.en: A colored road signal that tells drivers and pedestrians when to stop or go.
meaning.zh-Hant: 以燈號告訴駕駛人與行人何時停止或通行的道路號誌。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘pleasantly entertained’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「感到愉快有趣，或覺得某件事好笑的」？

example.text: The audience looked amused by the comedian's story.

translation.zh-Hant: 觀眾似乎被喜劇演員的故事逗樂了。

meaning.en: Pleasantly entertained or finding something funny.
meaning.zh-Hant: 感到愉快有趣，或覺得某件事好笑的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘shelf for books’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來存放書籍的一層或一組架子」？

example.text: The dictionary is on the top bookshelf beside the window.

translation.zh-Hant: 字典放在窗邊最上層的書架上。

meaning.en: A shelf or set of shelves used to store books.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來存放書籍的一層或一組架子。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘extinct prehistoric animal’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「生活在數百萬年前、屬於史前爬行動物族群的動物」？

example.text: The museum displayed a complete dinosaur skeleton in the main hall.

translation.zh-Hant: 博物館在大廳展出了一具完整的恐龍骨架。

meaning.en: A member of a prehistoric group of reptiles that lived millions of years ago.
meaning.zh-Hant: 生活在數百萬年前、屬於史前爬行動物族群的動物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘1970s dance music’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一種節奏強烈、於一九七〇年代流行的舞曲風格」？

example.text: The DJ played disco while colorful lights flashed above the dance floor.

translation.zh-Hant: DJ 播放迪斯可舞曲時，彩色燈光在舞池上方閃爍。

meaning.en: A style of dance music with a strong beat that became popular in the 1970s.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種節奏強烈、於一九七〇年代流行的舞曲風格。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘moving staircase’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「載送人們往返不同樓層的電動樓梯」？

example.text: Take the escalator to the second floor of the department store.

translation.zh-Hant: 請搭電扶梯到百貨公司的二樓。

meaning.en: A moving staircase that carries people between different floors.
meaning.zh-Hant: 載送人們往返不同樓層的電動樓梯。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘small fruit grown in bunches’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「成串生長、可能呈綠色、紅色或紫色的小圓形水果」？

example.text: She added a grape to each child's lunch box.

translation.zh-Hant: 她在每個孩子的午餐盒裡放了一顆葡萄。

meaning.en: A small, round fruit that grows in bunches and may be green, red, or purple.
meaning.zh-Hant: 成串生長、可能呈綠色、紅色或紫色的小圓形水果。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘large fruit with a rind’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「通常呈圓形、外皮較硬且果肉多汁的大型水果」？

example.text: We cut the melon into slices and served it after dinner.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們把瓜切成片，晚餐後端上桌。

meaning.en: A large, usually round fruit with a firm rind and juicy flesh.
meaning.zh-Hant: 通常呈圓形、外皮較硬且果肉多汁的大型水果。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘Muslim place of worship’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「穆斯林聚集祈禱與禮拜的建築物」？

example.text: Visitors removed their shoes before entering the mosque.

translation.zh-Hant: 訪客進入清真寺前脫下了鞋子。

meaning.en: A building where Muslims gather to pray and worship.
meaning.zh-Hant: 穆斯林聚集祈禱與禮拜的建築物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘waterproof outer coat’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「下雨時穿著、用來保持身體乾燥的防水外套」？

example.text: Pack a raincoat because the forecast says it may rain tomorrow.

translation.zh-Hant: 請帶一件雨衣，因為天氣預報說明天可能下雨。

meaning.en: A waterproof coat worn to keep the body dry in the rain.
meaning.zh-Hant: 下雨時穿著、用來保持身體乾燥的防水外套。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘hair-washing liquid’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來清洗頭髮或類似纖維的液態清潔產品」？

example.text: I ran out of shampoo, so I bought a new bottle at the drugstore.

translation.zh-Hant: 我的洗髮精用完了，所以在藥妝店買了一瓶新的。

meaning.en: A liquid cleaning product used to wash hair or similar fibers.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來清洗頭髮或類似纖維的液態清潔產品。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘long thin pasta’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「製成細長條狀的義大利麵」？

example.text: The restaurant served spaghetti with tomato sauce and fresh basil.

translation.zh-Hant: 那家餐廳端上了佐番茄醬汁和新鮮羅勒的義大利麵。

meaning.en: Pasta made in the form of long, thin strands.
meaning.zh-Hant: 製成細長條狀的義大利麵。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person aged thirteen to nineteen’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「年齡介於十三歲至十九歲之間的人」？

example.text: Every teenager at the school can join the summer volunteer program.

translation.zh-Hant: 校內每位青少年都可以參加暑期志工計畫。

meaning.en: A person who is between thirteen and nineteen years old.
meaning.zh-Hant: 年齡介於十三歲至十九歲之間的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘wheeled mobility chair’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「協助步行有困難或無法步行的人移動的輪椅」？

example.text: The station has a ramp for passengers who use a wheelchair.

translation.zh-Hant: 車站設有坡道，方便使用輪椅的旅客通行。

meaning.en: A chair with wheels that helps a person move when walking is difficult or not possible.
meaning.zh-Hant: 協助步行有困難或無法步行的人移動的輪椅。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘business of financial services’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「經營銀行並提供金融服務的業務」？

example.text: Mobile banking makes it easy to transfer money without visiting a branch.

translation.zh-Hant: 行動銀行讓人不必前往分行就能輕鬆轉帳。

meaning.en: The business of operating banks and providing financial services.
meaning.zh-Hant: 經營銀行並提供金融服務的業務。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person just starting’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「最近才開始學習或從事某件事的人」？

example.text: This cooking class is suitable for a complete beginner.

translation.zh-Hant: 這堂烹飪課適合完全沒有經驗的初學者。

meaning.en: Someone who has only recently started learning or doing something.
meaning.zh-Hant: 最近才開始學習或從事某件事的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘joyful social event’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「表達喜悅、感謝、讚賞或紀念之意的活動」？

example.text: The team held a celebration after completing the difficult project.

translation.zh-Hant: 團隊完成那項艱難的專案後舉行了慶祝活動。

meaning.en: An event or activity that expresses joy, gratitude, appreciation, or remembrance.
meaning.zh-Hant: 表達喜悅、感謝、讚賞或紀念之意的活動。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘comic circus performer’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「常在馬戲團演出、穿著鮮豔服裝並化誇張妝容的喜劇表演者」？

example.text: The clown made the children laugh by pretending to drop his hat.

translation.zh-Hant: 小丑假裝把帽子掉在地上，逗得孩子們大笑。

meaning.en: A comic performer, often in a circus, who wears colorful clothes and exaggerated makeup.
meaning.zh-Hant: 常在馬戲團演出、穿著鮮豔服裝並化誇張妝容的喜劇表演者。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘small bag for personal items’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來攜帶金錢與其他個人物品的小包」？

example.text: She kept her passport and wallet in her handbag.

translation.zh-Hant: 她把護照和皮夾放在手提包裡。

meaning.en: A small bag used to carry money and other personal items.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來攜帶金錢與其他個人物品的小包。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person asking interview questions’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在面談或訪談中提出問題的人」？

example.text: The interviewer asked why I wanted to work for the company.

translation.zh-Hant: 面試官問我為什麼想為這家公司工作。

meaning.en: A person who asks questions during an interview.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在面談或訪談中提出問題的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person gaining knowledge or skills’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「正在獲取知識或學習技能的人」？

example.text: Every learner can review the lesson at a comfortable pace.

translation.zh-Hant: 每位學習者都能以自己舒適的速度複習課程。

meaning.en: A person who is gaining knowledge or learning a skill.
meaning.zh-Hant: 正在獲取知識或學習技能的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘metric volume unit’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「等於一千立方公分的公制容量單位」？

example.text: This reusable bottle holds one liter of water.

translation.zh-Hant: 這個可重複使用的水瓶能裝一公升的水。

meaning.en: A metric unit of capacity equal to one thousand cubic centimeters.
meaning.zh-Hant: 等於一千立方公分的公制容量單位。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘high-speed divided road’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「供車輛高速行駛、採分向設計且交叉道路位於不同高度的主要公路」？

example.text: The motorway was closed after a serious accident near the exit.

translation.zh-Hant: 出口附近發生嚴重事故後，那條高速公路封閉了。

meaning.en: A major divided road designed for fast motor traffic, with crossings at different levels.
meaning.zh-Hant: 供車輛高速行駛、採分向設計且交叉道路位於不同高度的主要公路。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘fleshy part of a fungus’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「真菌肉質的子實體，通常呈傘狀」？

example.text: She sliced a mushroom and added it to the soup.

translation.zh-Hant: 她把一朵蘑菇切片後加進湯裡。

meaning.en: The fleshy, often umbrella-shaped fruiting body of a fungus.
meaning.zh-Hant: 真菌肉質的子實體，通常呈傘狀。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘oil pressed from olives’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「從橄欖壓榨而成，常用於烹調或沙拉醬汁的油」？

example.text: Drizzle a little olive oil over the vegetables before roasting them.

translation.zh-Hant: 烘烤蔬菜前，先在上面淋一點橄欖油。

meaning.en: An oil pressed from olives and commonly used in cooking or salad dressing.
meaning.zh-Hant: 從橄欖壓榨而成，常用於烹調或沙拉醬汁的油。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘outdoor play area’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「供兒童玩耍的開放空間，通常設有鞦韆、溜滑梯或其他遊樂設施」？

example.text: The children ran to the playground as soon as recess began.

translation.zh-Hant: 下課時間一開始，孩子們就跑向遊樂場。

meaning.en: An open area where children can play, often with swings, slides, or other equipment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 供兒童玩耍的開放空間，通常設有鞦韆、溜滑梯或其他遊樂設施。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘short test’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「範圍比大型考試小的簡短課堂測驗」？

example.text: We have a vocabulary quiz at the beginning of class tomorrow.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們明天上課一開始有一場單字小考。

meaning.en: A short school test that is less extensive than a major examination.
meaning.zh-Hant: 範圍比大型考試小的簡短課堂測驗。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘work assigned for school’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為學校課程完成的作業，包括課堂上與在家完成的內容」？

example.text: He finished his schoolwork before meeting his friends.

translation.zh-Hant: 他完成學校作業後才去見朋友。

meaning.en: Work done for school, either in class or at home.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為學校課程完成的作業，包括課堂上與在家完成的內容。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘vehicle for travel in space’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「設計用來載運人員或設備穿越太空的交通工具」？

example.text: The spaceship carried scientific equipment toward the moon.

translation.zh-Hant: 那艘太空船載著科學設備飛向月球。

meaning.en: A vehicle designed to carry people or equipment through space.
meaning.zh-Hant: 設計用來載運人員或設備穿越太空的交通工具。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘clothing worn for swimming’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「專為游泳時穿著而設計的衣物」？

example.text: She packed her swimsuit before leaving for the beach.

translation.zh-Hant: 她去海灘前先把泳衣放進行李。

meaning.en: A garment designed to be worn while swimming.
meaning.zh-Hant: 專為游泳時穿著而設計的衣物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person leading visitors’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「旅途中帶領訪客並介紹地點或景點的人」？

example.text: Our tour guide explained the history of the old temple.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們的導遊介紹了那座古老寺廟的歷史。

meaning.en: A person who leads visitors and explains places or attractions during a trip.
meaning.zh-Hant: 旅途中帶領訪客並介紹地點或景點的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘impossible to forget’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「令人印象極為深刻，很難或不可能忘記的」？

example.text: Watching the sunrise from Alishan was an unforgettable experience.

translation.zh-Hant: 在阿里山看日出是一次難忘的經驗。

meaning.en: So memorable that it is very difficult or impossible to forget.
meaning.zh-Hant: 令人印象極為深刻，很難或不可能忘記的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘not significant’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「不重要、不具重大意義，或不值得多加注意的」？

example.text: The color of the folder is unimportant as long as the documents are complete.

translation.zh-Hant: 只要文件齊全，資料夾的顏色並不重要。

meaning.en: Not important, significant, or worthy of much attention.
meaning.zh-Hant: 不重要、不具重大意義，或不值得多加注意的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘software-based game’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「由軟體控制，並在電腦、遊戲主機、手機或類似螢幕上進行的遊戲」？

example.text: My brother and I played a cooperative video game after dinner.

translation.zh-Hant: 晚餐後，我和弟弟一起玩了一款合作型電玩遊戲。

meaning.en: A game controlled by software and played on a computer, console, phone, or similar screen.
meaning.zh-Hant: 由軟體控制，並在電腦、遊戲主機、手機或類似螢幕上進行的遊戲。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘defined area’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「具有特定用途、狀態或界線的區域」？

example.text: This street is a pedestrian zone on weekends.

translation.zh-Hant: 這條街週末是行人徒步區。

meaning.en: A particular region or area with a defined purpose, condition, or boundary.
meaning.zh-Hant: 具有特定用途、狀態或界線的區域。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘chair with arm supports’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「設有扶手、可支撐手臂的舒適椅子」？

example.text: Grandpa settled into the armchair to read the newspaper.

translation.zh-Hant: 爺爺坐進扶手椅裡看報紙。

meaning.en: A comfortable chair with supports for the arms.
meaning.zh-Hant: 設有扶手、可支撐手臂的舒適椅子。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘small baked snack’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「小而扁平、通常口感酥脆或紮實的烘焙食品」？

example.text: She dipped a biscuit into her tea during the break.

translation.zh-Hant: 休息時，她把一塊餅乾浸進茶裡。

meaning.en: A small, flat baked food that is usually crisp or firm.
meaning.zh-Hant: 小而扁平、通常口感酥脆或紮實的烘焙食品。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘humorous drawing’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「幽默的圖畫，有時附有文字說明，或由數幅這類圖畫組成的短篇作品」？

example.text: The newspaper published a cartoon about rising food prices.

translation.zh-Hant: 那份報紙刊登了一幅關於食品漲價的諷刺漫畫。

meaning.en: A humorous drawing, sometimes with a caption, or a short series of such drawings.
meaning.zh-Hant: 幽默的圖畫，有時附有文字說明，或由數幅這類圖畫組成的短篇作品。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘African great ape’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「原生於非洲森林與稀樹草原、智力很高的大型類人猿」？

example.text: The chimpanzee used a stick to reach food inside the narrow opening.

translation.zh-Hant: 那隻黑猩猩用棍子取得狹窄洞口裡的食物。

meaning.en: A highly intelligent great ape native to the forests and savannas of Africa.
meaning.zh-Hant: 原生於非洲森林與稀樹草原、智力很高的大型類人猿。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘not truthful or fair’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「言行不誠實或不公正的」？

example.text: The company fired the manager for dishonest business practices.

translation.zh-Hant: 公司因那名經理採取不誠實的商業手段而將他解雇。

meaning.en: Not truthful or fair in one's words or actions.
meaning.zh-Hant: 言行不誠實或不公正的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘shop selling medicine’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「販售藥品及其他日常用品的零售商店」？

example.text: I stopped at the drugstore to buy cold medicine and tissues.

translation.zh-Hant: 我到藥妝店買感冒藥和面紙。

meaning.en: A retail shop that sells medicines and other everyday products.
meaning.zh-Hant: 販售藥品及其他日常用品的零售商店。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘covering for the hand’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「覆蓋手部，且通常為各手指設有獨立部分的衣物」？

example.text: He removed one glove so that he could use his phone.

translation.zh-Hant: 他脫下一隻手套，好操作手機。

meaning.en: A piece of clothing that covers the hand and usually has separate sections for the fingers.
meaning.zh-Hant: 覆蓋手部，且通常為各手指設有獨立部分的衣物。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘child's child’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「某人的兒子或女兒所生的孩子，也就是孫子女或外孫子女」？

example.text: Their first grandchild was born last month.

translation.zh-Hant: 他們上個月迎來了第一個孫輩。

meaning.en: A child of one's son or daughter.
meaning.zh-Hant: 某人的兒子或女兒所生的孩子，也就是孫子女或外孫子女。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘son's or daughter's daughter’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「某人的兒子或女兒所生的女兒，也就是孫女或外孫女」？

example.text: His granddaughter calls him every Sunday evening.

translation.zh-Hant: 他的孫女每個星期日晚上都會打電話給他。

meaning.en: A daughter of one's son or daughter.
meaning.zh-Hant: 某人的兒子或女兒所生的女兒，也就是孫女或外孫女。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘cooked over direct heat’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在烤架上以直接熱源烤熟的」？

example.text: We ordered grilled fish with rice and seasonal vegetables.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們點了烤魚，搭配米飯和當季蔬菜。

meaning.en: Cooked on a grill over direct heat.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在烤架上以直接熱源烤熟的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘thousand-meter distance’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「等於一千公尺的公制長度單位」？

example.text: The hotel is about one kilometer from the train station.

translation.zh-Hant: 那間飯店距離火車站約一公里。

meaning.en: A metric unit of length equal to one thousand meters.
meaning.zh-Hant: 等於一千公尺的公制長度單位。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘way of living’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「個人或群體平常的生活方式，反映其習慣與價值觀」？

example.text: Regular exercise is an important part of her healthy lifestyle.

translation.zh-Hant: 規律運動是她健康生活方式的重要部分。

meaning.en: A person's or group's usual way of living, reflecting their habits and values.
meaning.zh-Hant: 個人或群體平常的生活方式，反映其習慣與價值觀。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘edible layered bulb’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一種植物的層狀鱗莖，廣泛用作蔬菜與調味料」？

example.text: Slice the onion thinly before adding it to the soup.

translation.zh-Hant: 把洋蔥切成薄片後再放進湯裡。

meaning.en: The layered bulb of a plant that is widely used as a vegetable and seasoning.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種植物的層狀鱗莖，廣泛用作蔬菜與調味料。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘store salesperson’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在商店裡協助顧客並銷售商品的員工」？

example.text: The shop assistant helped me find the correct shoe size.

translation.zh-Hant: 店員協助我找到正確的鞋子尺寸。

meaning.en: An employee who helps customers and sells goods in a shop.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在商店裡協助顧客並銷售商品的員工。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘visiting tourist attractions’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「旅行時參觀並欣賞有趣景點的活動」？

example.text: We spent the morning sightseeing around Tainan's historic district.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們上午在臺南歷史街區觀光。

meaning.en: The activity of visiting and looking at interesting places while traveling.
meaning.zh-Hant: 旅行時參觀並欣賞有趣景點的活動。

plainExpression: riding ocean waves on a board

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘riding ocean waves on a board’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「站在衝浪板上乘著海浪滑行的運動或活動」？

example.text: The beach is popular for surfing when the waves are strong.

translation.zh-Hant: 浪大的時候，這片海灘很受衝浪愛好者歡迎。

meaning.en: The sport or activity of riding ocean waves on a surfboard.
meaning.zh-Hant: 站在衝浪板上乘著海浪滑行的運動或活動。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘indoor paddle sport’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「球員使用小球拍，隔著球網在球桌兩側擊打輕球的運動」？

example.text: We played table tennis in the community center after work.

translation.zh-Hant: 下班後，我們在社區中心打桌球。

meaning.en: A sport in which players use small paddles to hit a light ball across a table divided by a net.
meaning.zh-Hant: 球員使用小球拍，隔著球網在球桌兩側擊打輕球的運動。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘schedule with times’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「列出活動、服務、抵達或出發時間的時刻表」？

example.text: Check the train timetable before leaving for the station.

translation.zh-Hant: 前往車站前，請先查看火車時刻表。

meaning.en: A schedule showing the times when events, services, arrivals, or departures occur.
meaning.zh-Hant: 列出活動、服務、抵達或出發時間的時刻表。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘below the water surface’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「位於、發生於或使用在水面下的」？

example.text: The divers used an underwater camera to photograph the coral reef.

translation.zh-Hant: 潛水員使用水下相機拍攝珊瑚礁。

meaning.en: Located, occurring, or used beneath the surface of the water.
meaning.zh-Hant: 位於、發生於或使用在水面下的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘single online document’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「全球資訊網上的單一文件，可使用瀏覽器查看」？

example.text: The web page lists the museum's opening hours and ticket prices.

translation.zh-Hant: 這個網頁列出了博物館的開放時間與票價。

meaning.en: A single document on the World Wide Web that is viewed with a browser.
meaning.zh-Hant: 全球資訊網上的單一文件，可使用瀏覽器查看。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘cry with tears’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「因強烈的悲傷或喜悅而哭泣流淚」？

example.text: She began to weep when she heard the emotional farewell speech.

translation.zh-Hant: 她聽到那段感人的告別致詞時，開始哭泣。

meaning.en: To cry and shed tears, often because of strong sadness or joy.
meaning.zh-Hant: 因強烈的悲傷或喜悅而哭泣流淚。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘draw a line beneath’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在字詞或段落下方畫線，特別是為了加以強調」？

example.text: Please underline the key dates in the contract.

translation.zh-Hant: 請在合約中的重要日期下方畫線。

meaning.en: To draw a line beneath a word or passage, especially to emphasize it.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在字詞或段落下方畫線，特別是為了加以強調。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘parent's parent’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「某人的父親或母親的父母，也就是祖父母或外祖父母」？

example.text: Her grandparents live nearby and visit every weekend.

translation.zh-Hant: 她的祖父母住在附近，每個週末都會來探望她。

meaning.en: A parent of one's father or mother.
meaning.zh-Hant: 某人的父親或母親的父母，也就是祖父母或外祖父母。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘short-sleeved collarless top’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「通常為短袖、沒有鈕扣與衣領的輕便上衣」？

example.text: She wore a clean T-shirt and jeans for the train ride.

translation.zh-Hant: 她穿著乾淨的 T 恤和牛仔褲搭火車。

meaning.en: A lightweight, collarless shirt without buttons, usually with short sleeves.
meaning.zh-Hant: 通常為短袖、沒有鈕扣與衣領的輕便上衣。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘colored drawing stick’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來畫圖的彩色蠟或粉筆棒」？

example.text: The child used a blue crayon to draw the sky.

translation.zh-Hant: 那個孩子用藍色蠟筆畫天空。

meaning.en: A stick of colored wax or chalk used for drawing.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來畫圖的彩色蠟或粉筆棒。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘earlier family member’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「某人的血緣先人，通常來自更早的世代」？

example.text: One of her ancestors moved to Taiwan more than a century ago.

translation.zh-Hant: 她的一位祖先在一百多年前移居臺灣。

meaning.en: A person from whom someone is descended, usually from a much earlier generation.
meaning.zh-Hant: 某人的血緣先人，通常來自更早的世代。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘object for holding things’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「用來盛裝、儲存或運送材料及其他物品的容器」？

example.text: Keep the leftover soup in a sealed container in the refrigerator.

translation.zh-Hant: 把剩下的湯裝進密封容器後放入冰箱。

meaning.en: An object used to hold, store, or transport materials or other items.
meaning.zh-Hant: 用來盛裝、儲存或運送材料及其他物品的容器。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘front-desk employee’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在接待櫃檯迎接訪客並處理電話或預約的員工」？

example.text: The receptionist confirmed my appointment and asked me to take a seat.

translation.zh-Hant: 接待人員確認我的預約後，請我坐下等候。

meaning.en: An employee who greets visitors and handles calls or appointments at a reception desk.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在接待櫃檯迎接訪客並處理電話或預約的員工。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘about fifteen milliliters’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「烹飪使用的容量單位，在多數國家約等於十五毫升」？

example.text: Add one tablespoon of soy sauce to the bowl.

translation.zh-Hant: 在碗裡加入一大匙醬油。

meaning.en: A cooking unit of volume equal to about fifteen milliliters in most countries.
meaning.zh-Hant: 烹飪使用的容量單位，在多數國家約等於十五毫升。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘Monday through Friday’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「星期一至星期五中的一天，而不是週末」？

example.text: The first train leaves earlier on a weekday than on Sunday.

translation.zh-Hant: 平日的第一班火車比星期日更早發車。

meaning.en: A day from Monday through Friday, rather than a weekend day.
meaning.zh-Hant: 星期一至星期五中的一天，而不是週末。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘one hundredth of a meter’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「等於一百分之一公尺的公制長度單位」？

example.text: Move the shelf one centimeter to the left.

translation.zh-Hant: 把架子向左移一公分。

meaning.en: A metric unit of length equal to one hundredth of a meter.
meaning.zh-Hant: 等於一百分之一公尺的公制長度單位。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘cooked beaten-egg dish’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「將打散的蛋煎至凝固，有時包入餡料的蛋料理」？

example.text: She made a cheese omelet for breakfast.

translation.zh-Hant: 她早餐做了一份起司歐姆蛋。

meaning.en: A dish of beaten eggs cooked until set, sometimes folded around a filling.
meaning.zh-Hant: 將打散的蛋煎至凝固，有時包入餡料的蛋料理。

plainExpression: able to continue without serious harm

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘able to continue without serious harm’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「能長期持續，且不會耗盡資源或造成嚴重環境破壞的」？

example.text: The company is looking for a more sustainable way to package its products.

translation.zh-Hant: 公司正在尋找更具永續性的產品包裝方式。

meaning.en: Able to continue over time without exhausting resources or causing serious environmental damage.
meaning.zh-Hant: 能長期持續，且不會耗盡資源或造成嚴重環境破壞的。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘tabletop game with pieces’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在特製板面上進行，通常使用棋子、卡牌或骰子的遊戲」？

example.text: We played a cooperative board game after dinner.

translation.zh-Hant: 晚餐後，我們玩了一款合作型桌上遊戲。

meaning.en: A game played on a specially designed board, often using pieces, cards, or dice.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在特製板面上進行，通常使用棋子、卡牌或骰子的遊戲。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘central dish of a meal’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一餐中份量最大或最重要的一道菜」？

example.text: For the main course, I ordered grilled fish with vegetables.

translation.zh-Hant: 主菜我點了烤魚配蔬菜。

meaning.en: The largest or most important dish served during a meal.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一餐中份量最大或最重要的一道菜。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘put money in for gain’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「把金錢投入企業或資產，期望獲得利潤」？

example.text: Many people invest in index funds for long-term growth.

translation.zh-Hant: 許多人投資指數型基金，以追求長期成長。

meaning.en: To put money into a business or asset in the hope of earning a profit.
meaning.zh-Hant: 把金錢投入企業或資產，期望獲得利潤。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘financial records professional’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「編製、查核或管理財務紀錄與帳目的專業人員」？

example.text: The accountant checked the company's expenses before preparing the report.

translation.zh-Hant: 會計師在編製報告前查核了公司的支出。

meaning.en: A professional who prepares, examines, or manages financial records and accounts.
meaning.zh-Hant: 編製、查核或管理財務紀錄與帳目的專業人員。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘sale to the highest bidder’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「把商品或財產賣給出價最高者的公開拍賣活動」？

example.text: The painting was sold at auction for twice its expected price.

translation.zh-Hant: 那幅畫在拍賣會上以預估價格的兩倍售出。

meaning.en: A public sale in which goods or property are sold to the person offering the highest price.
meaning.zh-Hant: 把商品或財產賣給出價最高者的公開拍賣活動。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘computer for a desk’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「設計放在桌上固定使用，而非隨身攜帶的個人電腦」？

example.text: The designer uses a powerful desktop to edit large video files.

translation.zh-Hant: 那位設計師使用高效能桌上型電腦編輯大型影片檔案。

meaning.en: A personal computer designed to remain on a desk rather than be carried around.
meaning.zh-Hant: 設計放在桌上固定使用，而非隨身攜帶的個人電腦。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘currency conversion value’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「一種貨幣兌換成另一種貨幣時所採用的比值」？

example.text: Check the exchange rate before converting Taiwan dollars to yen.

translation.zh-Hant: 把新臺幣兌換成日圓前，請先查看匯率。

meaning.en: The value at which one currency can be exchanged for another.
meaning.zh-Hant: 一種貨幣兌換成另一種貨幣時所採用的比值。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘limited-stop rail service’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「為了縮短行車時間，只停靠較少車站的列車服務」？

example.text: The express train reaches the airport in thirty-five minutes.

translation.zh-Hant: 這班特快列車三十五分鐘就能抵達機場。

meaning.en: A train service that stops at fewer stations in order to travel more quickly.
meaning.zh-Hant: 為了縮短行車時間，只停靠較少車站的列車服務。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘market for used goods’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「通常在戶外舉行，販售二手商品與平價物品的市場」？

example.text: We found an old camera at the flea market on Sunday.

translation.zh-Hant: 我們星期日在跳蚤市場找到一臺老相機。

meaning.en: A market, often held outdoors, where people sell used goods and inexpensive items.
meaning.zh-Hant: 通常在戶外舉行，販售二手商品與平價物品的市場。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘place selling vehicle fuel’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「販售汽油、柴油，且通常也販售其他車用補給品的場所」？

example.text: We stopped at a gas station to fill the tank before entering the mountains.

translation.zh-Hant: 進入山區前，我們到加油站停車加滿油。

meaning.en: A place where gasoline, diesel, and often other supplies for vehicles are sold.
meaning.zh-Hant: 販售汽油、柴油，且通常也販售其他車用補給品的場所。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘business providing coverage’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「銷售保險商品，並對承保範圍內的損失支付理賠金的公司」？

example.text: Contact the insurance company as soon as possible after the accident.

translation.zh-Hant: 事故發生後，請儘快聯絡保險公司。

meaning.en: A business that sells insurance policies and pays covered claims.
meaning.zh-Hant: 銷售保險商品，並對承保範圍內的損失支付理賠金的公司。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘lowest legal pay rate’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「法律允許雇主支付給員工的最低薪資標準」？

example.text: The government announced an increase in the minimum wage for next year.

translation.zh-Hant: 政府宣布明年將調高最低工資。

meaning.en: The lowest rate that an employer is legally allowed to pay an employee.
meaning.zh-Hant: 法律允許雇主支付給員工的最低薪資標準。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘busiest commuting period’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「道路與大眾運輸因通勤人潮而特別擁擠的時段」？

example.text: It can take twice as long to reach the office during rush hour.

translation.zh-Hant: 尖峰時段前往辦公室可能要花兩倍時間。

meaning.en: A time of day when roads and public transportation are especially crowded with commuters.
meaning.zh-Hant: 道路與大眾運輸因通勤人潮而特別擁擠的時段。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘business arranging trips’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「安排交通、住宿及其他旅遊服務的公司」？

example.text: The travel agency booked our flights and hotel in Osaka.

translation.zh-Hant: 旅行社替我們預訂了前往大阪的機票和飯店。

meaning.en: A business that arranges transportation, accommodation, and other travel services.
meaning.zh-Hant: 安排交通、住宿及其他旅遊服務的公司。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘automatic sales device’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「顧客付款後會自動提供商品的機器」？

example.text: I bought a bottle of water from the vending machine at the station.

translation.zh-Hant: 我在車站的自動販賣機買了一瓶水。

meaning.en: An automatic machine that provides goods after a customer makes a payment.
meaning.zh-Hant: 顧客付款後會自動提供商品的機器。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘formal meeting space’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「辦公室、飯店或類似建築中用來開會與簡報的房間」？

example.text: The client is waiting for us in the conference room on the third floor.

translation.zh-Hant: 客戶正在三樓的會議室等我們。

meaning.en: A room in an office, hotel, or similar building used for meetings and presentations.
meaning.zh-Hant: 辦公室、飯店或類似建築中用來開會與簡報的房間。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘diplomatic office below an embassy’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「領事在外國城市辦公或正式居住的場所」？

example.text: She contacted the consulate after losing her passport abroad.

translation.zh-Hant: 她在國外遺失護照後聯絡了領事館。

meaning.en: The office or official residence of a consul in a foreign city.
meaning.zh-Hant: 領事在外國城市辦公或正式居住的場所。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘person starting a business’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「創立並經營企業，同時承擔其財務風險的人」？

example.text: The young entrepreneur opened a bakery that employs ten local residents.

translation.zh-Hant: 那位年輕創業家開了一間麵包店，聘用了十名當地居民。

meaning.en: A person who starts and manages a business while accepting its financial risks.
meaning.zh-Hant: 創立並經營企業，同時承擔其財務風險的人。

prompt.en: Which expression best matches ‘in money matters’?
prompt.zh-Hant: 哪個詞最符合「在金錢、收入、成本或財務資源方面」？

example.text: The business is doing well financially this year.

translation.zh-Hant: 這家公司今年的財務狀況不錯。

meaning.en: In a way that relates to money, income, costs, or financial resources.
meaning.zh-Hant: 在金錢、收入、成本或財務資源方面。
